desc_en: [Hunter Exclusive] Not all wounds show immediately. Ranged hits have a 5% chance to inflict a 5-sec Hidden Wound. Dashing during this time will cause Coma.

desc_zh: 生命力顽强，生命值低于10%时会在5s内恢复20%生命值。(冷却时间40s)
desc_en: Possesses tenacious vitality, able to recover 20% of HP in 5 seconds when HP is below 10%. (CD: 40s)

desc_zh: 生命受到威胁时会唤起内心的野性，生命值低于30%时攻击力提升10%且每秒回复10点体力，但自身防御力也会降低20%，持续时间15s。(冷却时间30s)
desc_en: Dangers of death will bring out the wildness within. When HP is below 30%, ATK +10%, Stamina +10 per second, DEF -20%, lasting for 15 seconds. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】减轻火焰所造成的烧伤效果，被点燃时每次攻击敌人获得一层伤害提升效果，提升值等同于点燃伤害，至多叠加10层。
desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] Reduces the burn effect caused by flames. When the body is ignited, each attack gains a damage boost equal to the ignition damage taken, stacking up to 10 times.

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】减轻火焰所造成的烧伤效果，被点燃时每次攻击敌人获得一层伤害提升效果，提升值为1.5倍的点燃伤害，至多叠加10层。

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】减轻火焰所造成的烧伤效果，被点燃时每次攻击敌人获得一层伤害提升效果，提升值为2倍的点燃伤害，至多叠加10层。

desc_zh: 我烧起来了谁都别想跑，身体被点燃时能够将点燃效果传递给1米范围内的敌人
desc_en: When I'm on fire, no one can escape! When the body is ignited, the burn effect can be transferred to enemies within a 1m radius.

desc_zh: 对生命值低于30%的目标造成伤害时，有20%概率使本次伤害提升15%，并对目标造成一个持续5s的隐藏伤口，在此期间冲刺时会引发重度流血，每秒流失基于自身攻击力40%的生命值。
desc_en: Damaging a target with less than 30% HP has a 20% chance to increase the damage by 15% and inflict a 5-sec Hidden Wound. If the target dashes while wounded, they suffer Heavy Bleeding, losing HP equal to 40% of their ATK per second.

desc_zh: 身体每个关节对敌人都是威胁，身体受到来自5米以内的攻击时（头部除外），返还20%伤害给攻击者。

desc_zh: 对弱点施展重击，攻击到目标弱点部位时，有25%概率使本次部位伤害提升15%。
desc_en: Attacking the enemy's weak spot has a 25% chance of increasing damage by 15%.

desc_zh: 轻装上阵脚步更加迅捷，负重达到50%之前，移动速度提升5%。
desc_en: Unleash agility with a lighter pack. Movement Speed +5% faster the Load is less than 50%.

desc_zh: 轻装上阵脚步更加迅捷，负重达到50%之前，移动速度提升10%。

desc_zh: 背负重物脚步更加迅捷，负重达到90%之后，移动速度提升10%。

desc_zh: 背负重物脚步更加迅捷，负重达到90%之后，移动速度提升20%。
desc_en: Travels faster despite carrying weight. When load is above 90%, Movement Speed +20%.

desc_zh: 成功防御敌人的攻击后，使自身防御力提升30%持续12s，在此期间不会被造成暴击。(冷却时间30s)

desc_zh: 掌握高超的弹反技巧，成功弹反敌人的近距离攻击后返还本次伤害的20%给攻击者。

desc_zh: 【毒牙专属】从容优雅的应对战斗，12秒内没有受到任何伤害即会获得一层攻击力提升1%，攻击速度提升2%，暴击提升2%，暴击伤害提升2%，但此阶段自身受到的伤害会少量提升，至多叠加5层，每次受到伤害即移除一层效果。
desc_en: [Fang Exclusive] Fight with grace and elegance. Gain a stat boost after receiving no damage for 12 seconds, ATK +1%, Attack Speed +2%, Crit +2%, Crit DMG +2% at the cost of taking slightly higher damage, stacking up to 5 times; taking damage removes 1 stack each time.

desc_zh: 饮血充饥，对5米内的目标造成伤害时，有5%概率使其额外流失最大生命的3%（至多100点）并为攻击者恢复等量生命值。若目标处于流血状态，则效果提升至5%（至多150点）。
desc_en: Satiate hunger with blood. Dealing damage to targets within 5 meters has a 5% chance to inflict additional damage equal to 3% of their Max HP (up to 100 HP) and heal the attacker for the same amount. This effect is 5% stronger (up to 150 HP) against bleeding targets.

desc_zh: 饮血充饥，对5米内的目标造成伤害时，有10%概率使其额外流失最大生命的3%（至多100点）并为攻击者恢复等量生命值。若目标处于流血状态，则效果提升至5%（至多150点）。

desc_en: Blood is life. Taking damage has a 20% chance to activate Bloodlust Recovery, restoring HP equal to 10% of own ATK per second for 15 seconds. HP lost to Bleeding during this effect is converted into an equal amount of HP recovery. (CD: 25s)

desc_zh: 鲜血即生命，受到攻击时有20%的概率舐血恢复，每秒恢复基于自身攻击力20%的生命值，持续15s，在此期间受流血状态损失的生命将转换为1.25倍的生命恢复。（冷却时间25s）
desc_en: Blood is life. Taking damage has a 20% chance to activate Bloodlust Recovery, restoring HP equal to 20% of own ATK per second for 15 seconds. HP lost to Bleeding during this effect is converted into 1.25x the amount of HP recovery. (CD: 25s)

desc_zh: 以痛苦换取力量，被攻击到弱点部位时有25%概率15s内对敌人的弱点部位伤害提升20%，但自己的弱点受到伤害也会提升20%。持续15s（冷却时间25s）
desc_en: The pain gradually becomes unbearable. When own weak spot is attacked, has a 25% chance to increase the damage dealt to the enemy's weak spot by 20% in the next 15 seconds. However, the DMG taken on own weak spot also increases by 20%. The effect lasts for 15 seconds. (CD: 25s)

desc_zh: 以痛苦换取力量，被攻击到弱点部位时有25%概率15s内对敌人的弱点部位伤害提升40%，但自己的弱点受到伤害也会提升40%。持续15s（冷却时间25s）

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】每一击都势大力沉，对目标造成伤害时额外消耗15体力以使本次伤害提升5%，并额外消耗目标5点体力。
desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] Each strike carries tremendous force. When damaging a target, an extra 15 Stamina is consumed to increase the damage by 5% and drain 5 Stamina from the target.

desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] Each strike carries tremendous force. When damaging a target, an extra 15 Stamina is consumed to increase the damage by 10% and drain 7.5 Stamina from the target.

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】每一击都势大力沉，对目标造成伤害时额外消耗15体力以使本次伤害提升15%，并额外消耗目标10点体力。
desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] Each strike carries tremendous force. When damaging a target, an extra 15 Stamina is consumed to increase the damage by 15% and drain 10 Stamina from the target.

desc_en: By mastering the shield technique, you can use (10% Max Stamina+17) Stamina to deflect melee attacks, inflicting damage equal to 100% of your ATK on the attacker. However, if your Stamina is less than 30% while defending yourself, you will take 200% damage.

desc_zh: 【火石专属】忍无可忍则无需再忍，成功防御攻击且体力在60%以上则会恢复10点韧性，并获得一层防御力提升10%的效果，累计层数超过5层时进入爆发时刻6秒内造成的伤害提升50%。
desc_en: [Flint Exclusive] Stop tolerating when you cannot. After successfully defending against enemy attacks, if Stamina is above 60%, recovers Resilience by 10 and gains a stack of 10% increase in DEF. When reaching more than 5 stacks, enters the burst status that deals 50% more damage for 6 seconds.

desc_en: [Flint Exclusive] Stop tolerating when you cannot. After successfully defending against enemy attacks, if Stamina is above 60%, recovers Resilience by 30 and gains a stack of 10% increase in DEF. When reaching more than 5 stacks, enters the burst status that deals 100% more damage for 6 seconds.

desc_zh: 掌握精妙的恢复时机，成功弹反敌人的攻击后将恢复本次伤害15%的生命值。
desc_en: Times the tempo of recovery. Recovers HP equal to 15% of the damage dealt after successfully reflecting the enemy's attack.

desc_zh: 掌握精妙的恢复时机，成功弹反敌人的攻击后将恢复本次伤害25%的生命值。

desc_en: Times the tempo of recovery. Recovers HP equal to 35% of the damage dealt after successfully reflecting the enemy's attack.

desc_zh: 【火石专属】洞察敌人的防守缺陷，成功弹反敌人的攻击后3s内自己的攻击可以无视敌人的防御力。（冷却时间30s）
desc_en: [Flint Exclusive] Detects enemy's defensive deficiencies. Ignores the enemy's DEF within 3 seconds after reflecting the enemy's attack. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 【火石专属】洞察敌人的防守缺陷，成功弹反敌人的攻击后5s内自己的攻击可以无视敌人的防御力。（冷却时间30s）

desc_zh: 【火石专属】洞察敌人的防守缺陷，成功弹反敌人的攻击后7s内自己的攻击可以无视敌人的防御力。（冷却时间30s）
desc_en: [Flint Exclusive] Detects enemy's defensive deficiencies. Ignores the enemy's DEF within 7 seconds after reflecting the enemy's attack. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 化悲愤为力量，周围10米内有友方濒死或死亡时会被彻底激怒，攻击力提升10%，防御力提升15%，攻击速度提升5%，移动速度提升5%，每秒恢复体力10点，持续20秒。（冷却时间50s）
desc_en: Channels fury into strength, becoming utterly infuriated when there's a dying or dead ally within 10 meters, ATK +10%, DEF +15%, Attack Speed +5%, Movement Speed +5%, and recover 10 Stamina per second for 20 seconds. (CD: 50s)

desc_zh: 化悲愤为力量，周围10米内有友方濒死或死亡时会被彻底激怒，攻击力提升15%，防御力提升20%，攻击速度提升7.5%，移动速度提升10%，每秒恢复体力15点，持续20秒。（冷却时间50s）
desc_en: Channels fury into strength, becoming utterly infuriated when there's a dying or dead ally within 10 meters, ATK +15%, DEF +20%, Attack Speed +7.5%, Movement Speed +10%, and recover 15 Stamina per second for 20 seconds. (CD: 50s)

desc_zh: 化悲愤为力量，周围10米内有友方濒死或死亡时会被彻底激怒，攻击力提升20%，防御力提升25%，攻击速度提升10%，移动速度提升15%，每秒恢复体力20点，持续20秒。（冷却时间50s）
desc_en: Channels fury into strength, becoming utterly infuriated when there's a dying or dead ally within 10 meters, ATK +20%, DEF +25%, Attack Speed +10%, Movement Speed +15%, and recover 20 Stamina per second for 20 seconds. (CD: 50s)

desc_zh: 每当有敌人战败则会愈发兴奋，自己10米内有敌人濒死或死亡时，获得1次抵挡攻击伤害的效果，受到攻击即消耗1次。（冷却时间40s）
desc_en: Get more pumped after taking down each enemy. If there is a dying or killed enemy within 10 meters, gain 1 stack of attack blocking effect, which is consumed upon being attacked. (CD: 40s)

desc_zh: 每当有敌人战败则会愈发兴奋，自己10米内有敌人濒死或死亡时，获得2次抵挡攻击伤害的效果，受到攻击即消耗1次。（冷却时间40s）
desc_en: Get more pumped after taking down each enemy. If there is a dying or killed enemy within 10 meters, gain 2 stacks of attack blocking effect, which is consumed upon being attacked. (CD: 40s)

desc_zh: 每当有敌人战败则会愈发兴奋，自己10米内有敌人濒死或死亡时，获得3次抵挡攻击伤害的效果，受到攻击即消耗1次。（冷却时间40s）
desc_en: Get more pumped after taking down each enemy. If there is a dying or killed enemy within 10 meters, gain 3 stacks of attack blocking effect, which is consumed upon being attacked. (CD: 40s)

desc_zh: 被自己击杀的敌人死状异常惨烈，削弱尸体10米范围内的敌人使其攻击速度降低5%，暴抗降低10%，防御降低10%，持续20秒。
desc_en: The enemy died a terrible death, reducing the Attack Speed of surviving enemies within 10 meters, reducing their Attack Speed by 5%, Crit Resist by 10% and DEF by 10% for 20 seconds.

desc_zh: 被自己击杀的敌人死状异常惨烈，削弱尸体10米范围内的敌人使其攻击速度降低10%，暴抗降低15%，防御降低15%，持续20秒。
desc_en: The enemy died a terrible death, reducing the Attack Speed of surviving enemies within 10 meters, reducing their Attack Speed by 10%, Crit Resist by 15% and DEF by 15% for 20 seconds.

desc_zh: 被自己击杀的敌人死状异常惨烈，削弱尸体10米范围内的敌人使其攻击速度降低15%，暴抗降低20%，防御降低20%，持续20秒。
desc_en: The enemy died a terrible death, reducing the Attack Speed of surviving enemies within 10 meters, reducing their Attack Speed by 15%, Crit Resist by 20% and DEF by 20% for 20 seconds.

desc_zh: 手刃敌人的快感无以言表，每使一名敌人濒死或死亡，自身将获得5秒霸体并且在此期间暴抗极大幅度提升。（冷却时间30s）
desc_en: There are no words to describe the thrill from killing enemies. Each time you kill or bring an enemy to near death, gain Superarmor and a huge Crit Resist boost for 5 seconds. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 手刃敌人的快感无以言表，每使一名敌人濒死或死亡，自身将获得7.5秒霸体并且在此期间暴抗极大幅度提升。（冷却时间30s）

desc_en: There are no words to describe the thrill from killing enemies. Each time you kill or bring an enemy to near death, gain Superarmor and a huge Crit Resist boost for 10 seconds. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 沉着冷静临危不乱，6秒内没有任何移动时即会获得一层攻击力提升1%，攻击速度提升2%，暴击提升2%，暴击伤害提升2%，但此阶段自身受到的伤害会少量提升，至多叠加5层，移动后即会移除所有效果。
desc_en: Stay composed in the face of danger. Gain a stat boost after staying still for 6 seconds, ATK +1%, Attack Speed +2%, Crit +2%, Crit DMG +2% at the cost of taking slightly higher damage, stacking up to 5 times; all effects are removed after moving.

desc_zh: 沉着冷静临危不乱，6秒内没有任何移动时即会获得一层攻击力提升1.5%，攻击速度提升2%，暴击提升2%，暴击伤害提升3%，但此阶段自身受到的伤害会少量提升，至多叠加5层，移动后即会移除所有效果。
desc_en: Stay composed in the face of danger. Gain a stat boost after staying still for 6 seconds, ATK +1.5%, Attack Speed +2%, Crit +2%, Crit DMG +3% at the cost of taking slightly higher damage, stacking up to 5 times; all effects are removed after moving.

desc_zh: 沉着冷静临危不乱，6秒内没有任何移动时即会获得一层攻击力提升2%，攻击速度提升2%，暴击提升3%，暴击伤害提升4%，但此阶段自身受到的伤害会少量提升，至多叠加5层，移动后即会移除所有效果。

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】战斗节奏尽在掌控，攻击敌人时体力在70%以上则会获得一层攻击力、攻击速度提升2%的效果，持续10秒，至多叠加5层。（不满足则会移除所有效果）
desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] Controls the rhythm of the battle, and gains 1 stack of boosts for ATK +2% and Attack Speed +2% when attacking enemies while maintaining over 70% Stamina, lasting for 10 seconds and stacking up to 5 times. (Removes all effects if conditions are not met)

desc_zh: 【利爪专属】战斗节奏尽在掌控，攻击敌人时体力在70%以上则会获得一层攻击力、攻击速度提升3%的效果，持续10秒，至多叠加5层。（不满足则会移除所有效果）

desc_zh: 双目如雄鹰般犀利，攻击15米外敌人的弱点部位时使本次部位伤害提升15%。
desc_en: Keen as an eagle's sight. When attacking an enemy 15 meters away, the damage to weak spots +15%.

desc_zh: 【火石专属】距离越远的攻击对自己威胁越小，受到来自10米外的攻击时，有20%的概率使本次受到的伤害降低30%。
desc_en: [Flint Exclusive] The greater the distance, the less dangerous the threat. When hit by a ranged attack from 10 meters away, there's a 20% chance to reduce the damage taken by 30%.

desc_en: [Fang Exclusive] Full of lethal poison, each attack has a 5% chance of inflicting a stack of 10-sec Poison effect (DMG Over Time, Stamina Loss, Weak Spirit), stacking up to 5 times.

desc_en: [Claw Exclusive] The ferocious attacks instill fear in enemies' hearts. When hitting the target, has a 5% chance to reduce their ATK by 3%, DEF by 2% and Movement Speed by 5% for 15s, stacking up to 5 times.

desc_en: Generates malice towards enemies carries debuffs; when attacking targets within 5m under Poison, Burn and Bleed, has a 15% chance to gain a stack of effect that boost self Crit by 1% and Crit DMG by 2%, lasts for 10s, can be stacked up to 5 times.

desc_zh: 酒醉人不醉，在饮用酒类道具后的15秒内可自动闪避1次攻击，喜好饮酒者会获得更多次数，次数耗尽效果即清除（冷却时间30秒）。
desc_en: Drunk in appearance, sober in spirit. Dodge 1 attack within 15 seconds after drinking. Drinkers dodge more attacks (CD: 30 seconds).

desc_en: Drunk in appearance, sober in spirit. Dodge 3 attacks within 15 seconds after drinking. Drinkers dodge more attacks (CD: 30 seconds).

desc_zh: 【战士专属】以猛兽般的攻势压制敌人，清空目标韧性时会移除其霸体状态，12s内攻击速度提升10%，若每击伤害超过目标最大生命5%则恢复体力。（冷却时间60s）
desc_en: [Warrior Exclusive] Unleash a ferocious offense to suppress the enemy. Depleting a target's Resilience will also remove their Superarmor. Attack Speed +10% for 12 seconds and gains Stamina if damage per hit > 5% of target's Max HP. (CD: 60s)

desc_zh: 首次受到武器攻击后，该伤害将在5秒内恢复。若在恢复期间再次受到武器攻击，则立即对自身造成与首次武器攻击相等的伤害，并终止恢复效果。（冷却时间10秒）
desc_en: Upon taking Weapon Damage for the first time, that Damage is recovered over 5s. Taking Weapon Damage again during this recovery immediately inflicts Damage equal to the initial strike and cancels the recovery. (CD: 10s)

desc_zh: 弹反敌人攻击时，若敌人当前的攻防相关属性高于自身，则强化自身较低的部分，基于敌人实力至多提升20%，持续12秒。（冷却时间60秒）
desc_en: When reflecting an enemy's attack, if the enemy's attack or defense stats exceed the character's, the character boosts the lower stat by up to 20% based on the enemy's strength for 12 seconds. (Cooldown: 60 seconds)

desc_en: Successfully dodging an enemy attack grants immunity to next incoming damage for the next 2 seconds. (CD: 5 seconds)

desc_en: 15% chance to trigger after successfully dodging an enemy's attack; the next attack within 2 sec has +100% Crit Rate and randomly inflicts Baffle, Confuse or Reverse-Dodge for 6 seconds. (Cooldown: 12 seconds)

desc_zh: 成功闪避敌人攻击后有20%概率触发，3s内的下一次攻击暴击增加100%，并随机对其造成「混乱」「迷惑」「逆闪」其中一种效果持续6秒。（冷却时间12秒）

desc_zh: 成功闪避敌人攻击后有25%概率触发，4s内的下一次攻击暴击增加100%，并随机对其造成「混乱」「迷惑」「逆闪」其中一种效果持续6秒。（冷却时间12秒）
desc_en: 25% chance to trigger after successfully dodging an enemy's attack; the next attack within 4 sec has +100% Crit Rate and randomly inflicts Baffle, Confuse or Reverse-Dodge for 6 seconds. (Cooldown: 12 seconds)

desc_zh: 成功闪避敌人攻击后，在4秒内使自己的攻击无法被弹反，并使自己的任意武器攻击能够弹反敌人的攻击。
desc_en: After a successful dodge, the character's attacks cannot be reflected back for 4s, and their weapon attacks can reflect enemy attacks.

desc_zh: 成功闪避敌人攻击后，在6秒内使自己的攻击无法被弹反，并使自己的任意武器攻击能够弹反敌人的攻击。

desc_zh: 处于濒死状态时，附近有敌人进入濒死或死亡可使自己立即脱离濒死状态。
desc_en: While in a [Near-Death] state, if a nearby enemy is downed to near-death or killed, the character immediately exits the [Near-Death] state.

desc_zh: 处于濒死状态时，附近有敌人进入濒死或死亡可使自己立即脱离濒死状态，并额外恢复10%生命。
desc_en: While in a [Near-Death] state, if a nearby enemy is downed to near-death or killed, the character immediately exits the [Near-Death] state and additionally recovers 10% HP.

desc_zh: 处于濒死状态时，附近有敌人进入濒死或死亡可使自己立即脱离濒死状态，并额外恢复20%生命。
desc_en: While in a [Near-Death] state, if a nearby enemy is downed to near-death or killed, the character immediately exits the [Near-Death] state and additionally recovers 20% HP.

desc_zh: 处决目标时可以削弱10米范围内的敌人，使其陷入懦弱状态攻击力、暴击下降10%，攻击速度下降5%，持续15秒。
desc_en: When executing a target, enemies within 10 meters are weakened and enter the Coward state, suffering a 10% reduction in ATK and Crit, and a 5% reduction in Attack Speed, lasting 15 seconds.

desc_zh: 在受到任何生命恢复类效果时恢复量提升20%。

desc_zh: 与好友一起燃烧生命何尝不是一件美事，身体被点燃时会将火焰传递给1米范围内的友方。
desc_en: Ignite your body and soul with your friends! When you catch fire, spread the flames to nearby allies within 1m.

desc_zh: 天性温和，在生活和战斗时行为比较正常，做出异常行为的概率较低。
desc_en: Has a gentle nature and is pretty normal in both life and combat. It's unlikely he'll do anything peculiar.

desc_zh: 个性激进富有感染力，在生活和战斗时执行力强，勇往直前绝不退让。
desc_en: Boasts a radical personality that is contagious; strong and determined in both life and combat, and courageously moves forward without giving up.

desc_zh: 出生于一个地位卑微资源匮乏的氏族，只能依靠苦力生存，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Born into a poor and inferior clan and makes a living through hard manual labor. Proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting +50%.

desc_zh: 氏族衰败族人靠做苦力将自己养大，从小耳濡目染，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: The clan is poor, and its people depend on manual labor for survival. As a result of the influences, the proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting +60%.

desc_zh: 在努力生存的过程中积累了大量做苦力的经验，掌握着丰富且实用的做工技巧，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Mastered extensive and useful craftsmanship skills while doing heavy labor. Proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting +75%.

desc_zh: 氏族中学徒颇多，从小耳濡目染，学习纺织、制陶、木石、制皮、烧窑的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: There are many apprentices in the clan, and as a result of the influences, the proficiency growth rate for learning weaving, potting, wood & stone, leatherworking, and kilning +50%.

desc_zh: 族人曾教过很多的杂工经验和技巧，这是一种传承，学习纺织、制陶、木石、制皮、烧窑的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: Inherited many of the clan's craftsman skills and knowledge. Proficiency growth rate for learning weaving, potting, wood & stone, leatherworking, and kilning +60%.

desc_zh: 对于杂工的适应能力极强，手脚麻利，学习纺织、制陶、木石、制皮、烧窑的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Demonstrates exceptional versatility and agility in various tasks Proficiency growth rate for learning weaving, potting, wood & stone, leatherworking, and kilning +75%.

desc_zh: 出生于一个工匠氏族，从小耳濡目染，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Born into a craftsman clan and skilled in crafting. Proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking +50%.

desc_zh: 族人中曾诞生过很多有名的工匠，在名匠熏陶下，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that has produced a lot of famous artisans. Proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking +60%.

desc_zh: 年少时就展现出了过人的制造天份而备受期待，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Showed an extraordinary manufacturing talent from a young age and was highly anticipated since then. The proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking +75%.

desc_zh: 出生于一个战士氏族，从小耳濡目染，学习刀，双刀，锤，大剑，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Born into a warrior clan and skilled in fighting. Proficiency growth rate for blade, dual-blade, hammer, great sword, and gauntlets +50%.

desc_zh: 族人中有很多小有名气的战士，擅长近身搏斗，从小耳濡目染学习刀，双刀，锤，大剑，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that has produced many famous warriors who are good at melee fighting. Proficiency growth rate for blade, dual-blade, hammer, great sword, and gauntlets +60%.

desc_zh: 族人中曾诞生过赫赫有名的战士，这份荣耀延续至今，学习刀，双刀，锤，大剑，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that has produced many famous warriors. Proficiency growth rate for blade, dual-blade, hammer, great sword, and gauntlets +75%.

desc_zh: 出生于一个猎人氏族，从小耳濡目染学习弓，矛，刀，双刀，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Born into a hunter clan and skilled in hunting. Proficiency growth rate for bow, spear, blade, dual-blade, and gauntlets +50%.

desc_zh: 族人中有很多小有名气的猎手，擅长给予猎物致命一击，从小耳濡目染学习弓，矛，刀，双刀，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that has produced many famous hunters who are good at delivering killing blows. Proficiency growth rate for bow, spear, blade, dual-blade, and gauntlets +60%.

desc_zh: 族人中曾出过多名传奇猎人，在猎人基因的影响下，学习弓，矛，刀，双刀，拳套类武器的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that has produced numerous legendary hunters. Proficiency growth rate for bow, spear, blade, dual-blade, and gauntlets +75%.

desc_zh: 在一群氏族守卫的环绕下成长，从小耳濡目染，学习大剑、刀、矛、盾、弓类武器的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Raised in the company of a squad of clan guards, and as a result of their influences, the proficiency growth rate for great sword, blade, spear, shield, and bow +50%.

desc_zh: 氏族中有很多守夜卫士，带着年少的你在漫长黑夜中磨练技艺，学习大剑、刀、矛、盾、弓类武器的熟练度成长速度提升60%。
desc_en: Many of the clan's watchmen have taken you with them to hone your skills during the night. Proficiency growth rate for great sword, blade, spear, shield, and bow +60%.

desc_zh: 曾担任过数任神庙卫士，因武艺精湛而备受重用，学习大剑、刀、矛、盾、弓类武器的熟练度成长速度提升75%。
desc_en: Once promoted to a high position as a temple guard for exceptional martial arts. Proficiency growth rate for great sword, blade, spear, shield, and bow +75%.

desc_zh: 族人中频出能工巧匠不擅苦力，受族人影响，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: Brought up in a clan that values craftsmanship more than hard labor. Proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting -25%.

desc_zh: 族人中少有做粗活的人，从小耳濡目染，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Raised in a clan that rarely produces laborers. With its influences. Proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting -35%.

desc_zh: 出生于富裕的氏族自年少时就非常厌恶做苦力，学习伐木、采矿、种植、采收的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: Born into a wealthy clan and despised hard manual labor from a young age. Proficiency growth rate for logging, mining, planting, and harvesting -50%.

desc_zh: 氏族中有很多杂工，但自己是个特立独行不愿随波逐流的人，学习纺织、木石、制皮、制陶、烧窑的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: An individual with a strong sense of independence, prefers to stand out and not go with the flow. Proficiency growth rate for learning weaving, wood planing, stone cutting, leatherworking, potting, and kilning -25%.

desc_zh: 族人都是一群差劲的杂工，从小耳濡目染，学习纺织、木石、制皮、制陶、烧窑的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Raised among a clan of terrible handymen. Proficiency growth rate for learning weaving, wood planing, stone cutting, leatherworking, potting, and kilning -35%.

desc_zh: 年少时便对重复且枯燥的杂活敬而远之，学习纺织、木石、制皮、制陶、烧窑的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: Strong aversion to repetitive and tedious chores, with a 50% reduction in proficiency growth rate for weaving, wood planing, stone cutting, leatherworking, potting, and kilning.

desc_zh: 完全没有遗传氏族中的匠人基因，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: Lacks the DNA for the craftsmanship of the clan. Proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking -25%.

desc_zh: 族人信奉慢工出细活，从小耳濡目染，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Brought up in a clan culture that values patience and precision. Proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking -35%.

desc_zh: 是一个糙汉，精细的手工打造完全不适合自己，学习工匠、炼金、武器制造、防具制造、烹饪的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: A brutish guy who is too rough for fine craft work. Proficiency growth rate for learning craftsmanship, alchemy, weapon crafting, armor crafting and cooking -50%.

desc_zh: 时常受到族人的打压为了反抗压迫，专注于搏斗能力的提升而忽略了其他技艺，学习矛，弓，盾类武器的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: The constant oppression from the tribesmen led to a focus on fighting abilities and ignorance of other skills. Proficiency growth rate for spear, bow, and shield -25%.

desc_zh: 被强大战士的光环笼罩是痛苦的，想变得更强大但忽略了其他能力的成长，学习矛，弓，盾类武器的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Being a great warrior is hard. He'll have to sacrifice the development of other skills to get stronger. Proficiency growth rate for spear, bow, and shield -35%.

desc_zh: 曾被族中的强者误导，导致错误的成长路线只专注于近身搏斗而疏于其他技艺的磨练，学习矛，弓，盾类武器的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: Misled by the seniors in the clan, focused on melee combat and ignored honing other skills. Proficiency growth rate for spear, bow, and shield -50%.

desc_zh: 年少时曾展现出一点猎手天份，导致成长路线偏激而忽略了其他能力的成长，学习大剑，盾，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: Showed a talent as a hunter when young, resulting in a distinct growth path while other abilities are ignored. The proficiency growth rate for great sword, shield, and hammer decreases by 25%.

desc_zh: 常年被族人怒斥狩猎技巧粗糙，导致拼命提升猎手能力而疏于其他技艺的磨练，学习大剑，盾，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Accused of having poor hunting skills, this tribesman puts tremendous effort into improving hunting skills while ignoring the development of other skills. Proficiency growth rate for great sword, shield, and hammer -35%

desc_zh: 自己是一个倔强的猎手，执着于提升狩猎能力而疏于其他技艺的磨练，学习大剑，盾，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: A stubborn hunter obsessed with improving hunting abilities while neglecting the training of other skills. Proficiency growth rate for great sword, shield, and hammer -50%.

desc_zh: 年少时曾经历过惨痛的教训，导致专注于护卫能力提升而忽略了其他技艺，学习双刀，拳套，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低25%。
desc_en: Due to painful childhood experiences, prefers improving guard and defense abilities to other skills. Proficiency growth rate for dual-blade, gauntlets, and hammer -25%.

desc_zh: 曾被族人痛斥护卫能力的不足，受其影响，学习双刀，拳套，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低35%。
desc_en: Blamed by other clan members for being terrible at defense. Proficiency growth rate for dual-blade, gauntlets, and hammer -35%.

desc_zh: 自己是一个古板的人，沉迷于提升护卫能力而疏于其他技艺的磨练，学习双刀，拳套，锤类武器的熟练度成长速度降低50%。
desc_en: Stubborn and obsessed with improving the protection abilities while neglecting the training of other skills. Proficiency growth rate for dual-blade, gauntlets, and hammer -50%.

desc_zh: 精通多种武器并且造诣颇高，使用任意武器造成的伤害提升10%，攻击速度提升10%。
desc_en: Proficient in a variety of weapons, DMG dealt with any weapon +10%, Attack Speed +10%.

desc_zh: 没有人比他更懂挨揍，受到攻击时若当前韧性超过50%则不会被造成暴击。
desc_en: A true master of endurance. Immune to critical hits if the unit's Resilience is above 50% when attacked.

desc_zh: 作为部落刽子手时恶行昭著名声在外，对躯干部位的伤害永久提升12%。
desc_en: The notorious executioner of the tribe. +12% Damage when attacking the Torso of the target.

desc_zh: 习惯黑夜融入黑夜成为黑夜，在黑夜中行动时移动速度提升10%，暴击提升5%。
desc_en: Get used to the dark and become a part of it. When moving at night, Movement Speed +10%, Crit +5%.

desc_zh: 祖传的飞斧绝活能够使猎物变得脆弱，使用飞斧命中目标时使其在10s内受到的伤害提升10%。
desc_en: The ancestral throwing axe skill has the power to render prey fragile. Hitting a target with the throwing axe increases its DMG taken by 10% for 10 seconds.

desc_zh: 曾用一把飞刀数米外击中部落头目使其流血而亡，一战成名，命中目标时能够对其造成每秒基于自身攻击力20%的流血效果，持续10s，可叠加。
desc_en: Made a name by taking down a tribal leader with a fly cutter from several meters away, leaving him bleeding out. When hitting the target, inflicts a bleeding effect that drains HP equal to 20% of self ATK per second, lasting 10s, and stackable.

desc_zh: 破坏喘息节奏使猎物感到慌乱，使用掷矛命中目标时使其体力恢复降低80%，持续10s。
desc_en: Throws off the prey's breathing rhythm. Hitting a target with the lance reduces its Stamina Recovery by 80% for 10 seconds.

desc_zh: 箭矢离弦的那一刻猎物的命运已经注定，使用弓类武器有20%的概率将命中的任意部位都视为弱点部位，并使目标移动速度降低50%，持续6s。
desc_en: The prey's destiny is sealed as the arrow leaves the bowstring. Using a bow grants a 20% chance to designate any hit part as a weak spot, and reduces the target's Movement Speed by 50% for 6 seconds.

desc_zh: 手艺精湛，烹饪、工匠熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Skilled in crafting, the proficiency growth rate for cooking and crafting +50%.

desc_zh: 手艺精湛，武器制造、防具制造、炼金熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Skilled in crafting, the proficiency growth rate for weapon crafting, armor crafting, and alchemy +50%.

desc_zh: 动物杀手，对非人生物造成的伤害提升10%。
desc_en: Animal killer; Damage dealt to non-human creatures +10%.

desc_zh: 攻击生命值低于30%或处于濒死状态的敌人会让自己兴奋，有25%概率短暂提升攻击力20%、增加移速20%、攻击速度10%，持续8s。（冷却时间30s）
desc_en: Gets a rush from attacking near-death enemies or enemies below 30% of Max HP, gaining a 25% chance to increase ATK and Movement Speed by 20%, and Attack Speed by 10% for 8 seconds. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 精神脆弱容易崩溃，最大精神降低50%。
desc_en: Fragile mind is easy to break, Max Morale -50%.

desc_zh: 漂泊半生撬箱无数，无论多么精密的箱子都能够快速打开，开启箱子的速度提升80%。
desc_en: Able to quickly open any box, no matter how intricate it is. The speed of opening boxes +80%.

desc_zh: 每个村里总有几个运气很好的人，我就是其中之一，稀有物品掉落概率增加20%。
desc_en: There are always a few lucky folks in every village, and I'm one of them! Chance of dropping rare items +20%.

desc_zh: 十里八村有名的倒霉催，掉落稀有物品的概率降低50%
desc_en: The legendary figure of misfortune in the neighborhood. Chance of dropping rare items -50%.

desc_zh: 像机器一样不知疲倦甚至让人担心精神状态是否正常，最大精神提高100%
desc_en: Tireless as a machine and make people worry about the mental health. Max Morale +100%.

desc_zh: 自命不凡内心从未认同过其他人，认同度降低速度提升200%，认同度过低时会携带一部分部落资产叛逃，当认同度降至400以下时暴露真我，在目标背后进行攻击时造成的伤害提升15%。
desc_en: Carries an unparalleled sense of self-importance, and never has recognition for others. The speed at which Recognition declines increases by 200%; when Recognition drops too low, defects the tribe with some assets; when Recognition falls below 400, reveals True Self, DMG dealt when attacking from the back of the enemy increases by 15%.

desc_zh: 被部落族人视为异类的存在皮肤结构异于常人，被施加烧伤或点燃后不会受到相应的效果影响。
desc_en: Because of their strange skin, tribesmen see them as alien. They are not affected by burn or ignition effects.

desc_zh: 油腻的身体仿佛浸过油罐，身体被点燃时受到的燃烧伤害翻倍。
desc_en: The greasy body seems as though it's been soaked in an oil tank. When ignited, the HP loss will be doubled.

desc_zh: 以血养身，对近距离目标造成的流血伤害，其中40%转化为生命恢复，若自身处于流血状态则效果提升为80%。
desc_en: Blood nourishment. 40% of Bleeding DMG dealt to melee targets is converted into healing. If the unit is currently Bleeding, this effect is increased to 80%.

desc_zh: 以失去闪避能力为代价，换来不受任何硬直的能力。
desc_en: Sacrifices Dodge ability for Immunity to Hitstun.

desc_zh: 做事精细，纺织、制陶、制皮的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Attentive to details. Proficiency growth rate for weaving, potting, and leatherworking +50%.

desc_zh: 干粗活一把好手，木石、烧窑熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Good at heavy works. Proficiency growth rate for wood planing, stone cutting, and kilning +50%

desc_zh: 以无形之手扼住敌人命喉，被近距离目标伤害时使其天赋触发概率降低5%，持续12秒，至多叠加5层。
desc_en: Suppress enemies with an invisible hand clamping their throat. Taking damage from melee attackers reduces their talent skill activation chance by 5% for 12 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

desc_zh: 掌握着威力强大的大剑技巧，使用大剑「蓄力重击」时，适时松开按键能够挥出更加强力的斩击。
desc_en: Greatsword Mastery: Release the button at the perfect moment during a Charged Heavy Strike to unleash an even more devastating slash.

desc_zh: 攻击命中时有15%概率触发，使其陷入「怯战」状态，持续15秒：期间其单次伤害不会超过300点。此伤害限制会受到施加者与被施加者的「部落地位」影响。（冷却时间30秒）
desc_en: Hitting an enemy has a 15% chance to inflict a 15-sec Dread on them: the target's single-hit damage capped at 300. Cap scales with the [Tribal Status] of both parties. (CD: 30s)

desc_zh: 命运凄苦天生苦力，伐木、采矿的熟练度成长速度提升50%。
desc_en: Destined to be a hardworking laborer, with a 50% increase in proficiency growth rate for logging, mining.

desc_zh: 对种田颇有心得，亲手种植的作物成长速度提升20%。
desc_en: Experienced in farming. The crops the character plants grow 20% faster.

desc_zh: 村里最好的屠宰师傅，屠宰动物的产出提升20%。
desc_en: The best slaughter in the village; output from slaughtering animals increases by 20%.

desc_zh: 经常随部落出战深谙战场生存之道，作为随从出战时受到的所有伤害降低40%。
desc_en: Has a lot of combat experience and skills. DMG taken -40% when fighting as a companion.

desc_zh: 经常随部落出战深谙战场生存之道，作为随从出战时受到的所有伤害降低50%。
desc_en: Has a lot of combat experience and skills. DMG taken -50% when fighting as a companion.

desc_zh: 经常随部落出战深谙战场生存之道，作为随从出战时受到的所有伤害降低60%。
desc_en: Has a lot of combat experience and skills. DMG taken -60% when fighting as a companion.

desc_zh: 每当吃到能填饱肚子的食物便感到身心舒畅，获得20点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低30%，获得心情值时提升75%。
desc_en: Feels content and gains 20 Mood when consuming food that provides satiety. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 30% and mood-improvement effects increase by 75%.

desc_zh: 每当吃到能填饱肚子的食物便感到身心舒畅，获得40点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低50%，获得心情值时提升100%。
desc_en: Feels content and gains 40 Mood when consuming food that provides satiety. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 50% and mood-improvement effects increase by 100%.

desc_zh: 每当吃到主食类型的食物时十分满足，获得60点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低70%，获得心情值时提升125%。（在此期间可使心情达到非常愉快状态）
desc_en: Feels satisfaction and gains 60 Mood when consuming staple food. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 70%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 125%. (During this time, it can lead to a state of elation.)

desc_zh: 喜欢吃肉，吃到肉食身心舒畅，获得20点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低30%，获得心情值时提升75%。
desc_en: Likes meat and gains 20 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 30%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 75%.

desc_zh: 喜欢吃肉，吃到肉食身心舒畅，获得40点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低50%，获得心情值时提升100%。
desc_en: Likes meat and gains 40 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 50%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 100%.

desc_zh: 肉食狂热，吃到肉食十分满足，获得60点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低70%，获得心情值时提升125%。（在此期间可使心情达到非常愉快状态）
desc_en: A meat enthusiast who is satisfied when consuming meat and gains 60 Mood. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 70%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 125%. (During this time, it can lead to a state of elation.)

desc_zh: 喜欢酱熟肉，吃到酱熟肉时身心舒畅，获得20点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低30%，获得心情值时提升75%。
desc_en: Likes sauced meat and gains 20 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 30%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 75%.

desc_zh: 喜欢酱熟肉，吃到酱熟肉时身心舒畅，获得40点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低50%，获得心情值时提升100%。
desc_en: Likes sauced meat and gains 40 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 50%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 100%.

desc_zh: 钟爱酱熟肉，吃到酱熟肉时十分满足，获得60点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低70%，获得心情值时提升125%。（在此期间可使心情达到非常愉快状态）
desc_en: Passionate about sauced meat and gains 60 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 70%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 125%. (During this time, it can lead to a state of elation.)

desc_zh: 喜欢吃番茄，吃到番茄时身心舒畅，获得20点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低30%，获得心情值时提升75%。
desc_en: Likes tomatoes and gains 20 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 30%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 75%.

desc_zh: 喜欢吃番茄，吃到番茄时身心舒畅，获得40点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低50%，获得心情值时提升100%。
desc_en: Likes tomatoes and gains 40 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 50%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 100%.

desc_zh: 番茄狂热者，吃到番茄时十分满足，获得60点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低70%，获得心情值时提升125%。（在此期间可使心情达到非常愉快状态）
desc_en: A tomato enthusiast who gains 60 Mood when consuming tomatoes. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 70%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 125%. (In the duration, enters a state of elation)

desc_zh: 喜欢吃水果蔬菜，吃到合适的食物时身心舒畅，获得20点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低30%，获得心情值时提升75%。
desc_en: Likes fruits & vegetables and gains 20 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 30%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 75%.

desc_zh: 喜欢吃水果蔬菜，吃到合适的食物时身心舒畅，获得40点心情值，并在15分钟内心情值下降速率降低50%，获得心情值时提升100%。
desc_en: Likes fruits & vegetables and gains 40 Mood when consuming it. For the next 15 minutes, the rate of mood decline decreases by 50%, and mood-improvement effects increase by 100%.
